slack_messages.text: Finished the gRPC proto definitions. If anyone from Product-Eng wants to take a look at the contract before I build the handlers, let me know.
AWS support is taking their time with the quota increase for the West region. Might be a blocker for the failover test scheduled for tomorrow.
The dashboard feels much snappier now. Merged the fix for the re-rendering issue.
Docs are live at /docs/internal. Please update your bookmarks!
@Chief-of-Staff I've got the cost breakdown for the logging infra ready. Can we sync for 5 mins today to discuss the data retention trade-offs?
